summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Role Restructure feature (Platform Admin vs Teacher vs Member). All 12 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI flows verified working correctly including Teacher Setup wizard.

issues: Onboarding overlay appears on top of Teacher Setup page for new teachers (user must click 'Skip tour' to proceed). This is expected behavior but may confuse users.

passed_tests: Admin login returns role=admin with needs_group_setup=false
Admin can access /api/groups/all (admin-only endpoint)
Admin /api/auth/me returns correct role and needs_group_setup=false
Teacher login returns needs_group_setup=true when no group_id
Teacher /api/auth/me shows needs_group_setup=true
Teacher cannot access admin-only endpoints (returns 403)
Teacher can create a group via POST /api/groups
Teacher is assigned to group after creation (group_id set)
Teacher limited to 1 group (second creation returns 400)
Registration without invite code fails (422)
Registration with invalid invite code fails (400)
Frontend: Admin login redirects to dashboard (not /teacher-setup)
Frontend: Admin sees 'Admin' link in nav
Frontend: Admin does NOT see 'My Group' link in nav
Frontend: Admin can access /admin page
Frontend: Teacher login redirects to /teacher-setup when needs_group_setup=true
Frontend: Teacher Setup Step 1 - 'Name Your Group' with input field
Frontend: Teacher Setup Step 2 - Shows invite code after group creation
Frontend: Teacher Setup Step 3 - 'You're All Set!' with 'Start Teaching' button
Frontend: After setup, teacher redirected to dashboard
Frontend: Teacher sees 'My Group' link in nav (not 'Admin')
Frontend: Teacher can access /teacher-dashboard
Frontend: Teacher cannot access /admin (redirected away)
Frontend: Register page requires invite code (Step 2)
Frontend: Invalid invite code shows error message
Frontend: Valid invite code shows group name and proceeds to Step 3

test_credentials.note: Teacher state was reset after testing - group_id=null, needs_group_setup=true

seed_data_creation: TEST_UI_Teacher_Group created during UI testing, then deleted during cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Role Restructure feature fully working. Key verifications: 1) Admin (kirah092804@gmail.com) has full access, sees 'Admin' in nav, can access /admin page. 2) Teacher without group (newteacher@test.com) is redirected to /teacher-setup, completes 3-step wizard to create group, then sees 'My Group' in nav. 3) After teacher creates group, /api/auth/me returns needs_group_setup=false. 4) Teachers cannot access /admin (admin-only). 5) Registration requires valid invite code. Teacher state has been reset for future testing.

teacher_setup_flow.step1: Name Your Group - input field for group name
teacher_setup_flow.step2: Invite Your Members - shows generated invite code
teacher_setup_flow.step3: You're All Set! - shows teacher capabilities, 'Start Teaching' button
teacher_setup_flow.after_setup: Redirects to dashboard, nav shows 'My Group' link

teacher_restrictions.no_admin_access: Cannot access /admin page or admin-only endpoints

registration.valid_code_preview: Shows group name when valid code entered
